hero.headline: Your yard, *done right* the first time
hero.subheadline: When the tree guys wreck your grass, we're who fixes it. 4.8 stars from 82 Columbia neighbors who know.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: From rescue jobs to regular maintenance
services_section.subheading: We handle what others can't — or won't

services.title: Yard Restoration & Repair
services.description: When contractors leave your lawn looking like a war zone, we put it back together. New sod, grading, whatever it takes.

services.title: Lawn Installation & Renovation
services.description: Centipede grass giving up? We'll help you pick the right replacement and install it properly.

services.title: Precision Maintenance
services.description: Clean edges, even trim, immaculate finish. The kind of cut that makes your neighbors notice.

services.title: Project Coordination
services.description: Need tree work or specialty services? We'll find the right crew and handle the coordination.

about.heading: Delano and the Blue Bird team
about.body: We've built our reputation one yard at a time in Columbia. When other contractors leave a mess, we're the ones neighbors call to fix it. Our 4.8-star rating comes from being honest about pricing, showing up on time, and doing the work right. No shortcuts, no surprises.

reviews.name: Heather M.
reviews.text: Incredible work at a terrific price. When they couldn't handle certain jobs, they found who could. Fixed everything the tree company destroyed.

reviews.name: Bree W.
reviews.text: Prompt, reasonable pricing, excellent communication. Great attention to detail and a joy to work with.

reviews.name: Brian B.
reviews.text: After our front yard took a beating, Blue Bird brought it back to life. Delano was patient answering questions and helped us choose right.

reviews.name: Hannah H.
reviews.text: Friendly, honest, great communication. The team was diligent and thorough giving our yard a complete makeover.

cta.heading: Ready to get your yard right?
cta.body: Free estimates, honest pricing, and work that speaks for itself. Call or text us your address and we'll come take a look.
